seo.title: Top 10 Things to Do in Ljubljana, Slovenia
seo.description: Discover 10 must-see landmarks in Ljubljana, Slovenia. Free GPS routes, photos, and history.
seo.intro: Planning a trip to Ljubljana? Explore the best places to visit in Ljubljana, Slovenia.
keywords: best places to visit in Ljubljana

places.name: Ljubljana Castle
places.description: A majestic medieval fortress perched on a hill above the old town, offering breathtaking panoramic vistas of Ljubljana.
places.seo_phrase: Ljubljana Castle Guide: Historic Views & Medieval Heritage

places.name: Triple Bridge
places.description: A unique trio of pedestrian stone bridges connecting Prešeren Square with the historic medieval town center.
places.seo_phrase: The Triple Bridge in Ljubljana: Jože Plečnik's Masterpiece

places.name: Prešeren Square
places.description: The vibrant central pedestrian square of Ljubljana, anchored by the monument of poet France Prešeren.
places.seo_phrase: Prešeren Square: The Lively Heart of Ljubljana's Old Town

places.name: Dragon Bridge
places.description: An artistic reinforced concrete bridge guarded by four formidable, beautifully detailed green sheet-copper sheet dragons.
places.seo_phrase: Dragon Bridge Ljubljana: Art Nouveau Dragons & Legend

places.name: Central Market
places.description: A lively open-air market backed by a sweeping riverside stone arcade designed by architect Jože Plečnik.
places.seo_phrase: Ljubljana Central Market: Local Produce & Plečnik Colonnades

places.name: Congress Square
places.description: A grand, historically significant neo-classical square framed by the University Palace and the beautiful Baroque Holy Trinity Church.
places.seo_phrase: Congress Square: Neo-Classical Architecture & Academic Heritage

places.name: Tivoli Park
places.description: Ljubljana's grand urban parkland featuring beautiful tree-lined avenues, outdoor photo galleries, and elegant botanical gardens.
places.seo_phrase: Tivoli Park Ljubljana: Green Spaces, Promenades & Culture

places.name: National Gallery of Slovenia
places.description: Slovenia's premier fine arts museum, housing the nation's definitive collection of paintings and sculptures from the 12th to 20th centuries.
places.seo_phrase: National Gallery of Slovenia: Fine Arts & Cultural Masterpieces

places.name: Cathedral of St. Nicholas
places.description: An exquisite baroque cathedral distinguished by its prominent green dome, twin bell towers, and intricate, modern bronze entry doors.
places.seo_phrase: Ljubljana Cathedral: Baroque Frescoes & Sculpted Bronze Doors

places.name: Robba Fountain
places.description: A masterpiece of baroque sculpture depicting three allegorical river gods pouring crystal water from marble urns.
places.seo_phrase: Robba Fountain Ljubljana: Baroque Allegory of Carniolan Rivers

seo.title: Top 10 Things to Do in Maribor, Slovenia
seo.description: Discover 10 must-see landmarks in Maribor, Slovenia. Free GPS routes, photos, and history.
seo.intro: Planning a trip to Maribor? Explore the best places to visit in Maribor, Slovenia.
keywords: best places to visit in Maribor

places.name: Old Vine House
places.description: A historic riverside house showcasing the oldest living and fruit-bearing grapevine in the world.
places.seo_phrase: The Old Vine House Maribor: World's Oldest Fruit-Bearing Grapevine

places.name: Maribor Castle
places.description: An elegant, palace-like urban fortress located right in the city center, home to a rich regional history museum.
places.seo_phrase: Maribor Castle: Regional Museum & Royal Baroque Interiors

places.name: Main Square
places.description: The spacious central square of Maribor, showcasing a grand Renaissance Town Hall and an ornate white marble commemorative column.
places.seo_phrase: Main Square Maribor: Renaissance Architecture & Plague Column
nearby_places: Cathedral of St. John the Baptist

places.name: Pyramid Hill
places.description: A scenic vine-covered hill overlooking Maribor, topped with a charming white devotional chapel on the site of a medieval castle.
places.seo_phrase: Pyramid Hill Maribor: Hiking Trails, Vineyards & City Views

places.name: Cathedral of St. John the Baptist
places.description: A solemn Gothic cathedral featuring an elongated presbytery, historic stone tombstones, and a panoramic viewing platform.
places.seo_phrase: Maribor Cathedral: Gothic Architecture & Slomšek Sanctuary

places.name: Franciscan Church
places.description: A striking monument of Neo-Romanesque architecture built entirely from distinct red clay bricks, featuring twin soaring bell towers.
places.seo_phrase: Franciscan Church Maribor: Red-Brick Neo-Romanesque Icon

places.name: Water Tower
places.description: A striking pentagonal medieval defense tower positioned along the riverbank, now operating as an elegant wine boutique.
places.seo_phrase: The Water Tower Maribor: Medieval Bastion Turned Wine Store

places.name: Maribor City Park
places.description: A beautifully landscaped landscape park featuring three peaceful lakes, mature exotic trees, and a historic musical pavilion.
places.seo_phrase: Maribor City Park: Lakeside Walks & Botanical Serenity

places.name: Maribor Cathedral
places.description: Maribor Cathedral is a visitor landmark in Maribor, Slovenia.

places.name: Maribor Lent District
places.description: Riverside Lent quarter with cafés along the Drava beneath the old town.

seo.title: Top 10 Things to Do in Piran, Slovenia
seo.description: Discover 10 must-see landmarks in Piran, Slovenia. Free GPS routes, photos, and history.
seo.intro: Planning a trip to Piran? Explore the best places to visit in Piran, Slovenia.
keywords: best places to visit in Piran

places.name: Tartini Square
places.description: A sweeping, oval-shaped marble pedestrian square surrounded by colorful Venetian palaces and the Adriatic sea.
places.seo_phrase: Tartini Square Piran: Venetian Gothic Gem on the Adriatic

places.name: Piran Town Walls
places.description: A beautifully preserved system of medieval stone walls and defensive towers offering views over the Piran peninsula.
places.seo_phrase: Piran Town Walls: Medieval Fortifications & Panoramic Sunsets

places.name: St. George's Parish Church
places.description: A historic church perched on a cliff overlooking the Adriatic Sea, featuring a bell tower modeled after St. Mark's Campanile.
places.seo_phrase: St. George's Church Piran: Clifftop Views & Venetian Bell Tower

places.name: Piran Harbour
places.description: A charming and active fishing port and marina that borders Tartini Square, lined with seafood terraces.
places.seo_phrase: Piran Harbour: Coastal Walks, Fishing Boats & Seafood Bistros

places.name: Venetian House
places.description: A beautiful 15th-century Venetian Gothic palace featuring a bright red exterior facade and detailed stone balconies.
places.seo_phrase: The Venetian House Piran: Gothic Architecture & Mid-15th Century Legend

places.name: Maritime Museum Sergej Mašera
places.description: A museum housed within an elegant 19th-century palace, dedicated to showcasing Slovenia's maritime and naval history.
places.seo_phrase: Sergej Mašera Maritime Museum Piran: Slovenia's Naval History

places.description: Aquileia — a notable landmark in Piran, Slovenia.

places.name: St. George's Parish Church (Piran)
places.description: St. George's Parish Church (Piran) is a visitor landmark in Piran, Slovenia.
places.seo_phrase: St. George's Parish Church (Piran) in Piran
places.maps_query: St. George's Parish Church (Piran), Piran, Slovenia

places.name: Loggia Palace
places.description: Loggia Palace is a visitor landmark in Piran, Slovenia.

places.name: Minorite Monastery of St. Francis
places.wiki_title: Minorite Monastery of St. Francis in Piran
places.description: A serene, historic monastery complex featuring an acoustic cross-vaulted stone cloister courtyard.
